memes.label: American Society of Mechanical Engineers
memes.description: 'Professional engineering society founded in 1880, hosting papers on mill construction, fire protection, and industrial technology by engineers including C.J.H. Woodbury'

memes.label: Architectural Competitions
memes.description: 'The system of competitive design in architecture, encompassing open competitions for public buildings, monthly sketch-club competitions for professional development, and the journal''s role in publishing competitive drawings.'

memes.description: The practice and professional role of architectural drawings — plans, perspectives, sketches, and specifications — as discussed in the 1890 journal, including their use in publication, client communication, and contract documentation.

memes.description: Natural and artificial lighting in architecture, from ancient lattice windows to the 1890s adoption of electric lighting systems such as the Brush system discussed in the journal.
